task_completion.description: Create the conditions CSV file with the required 'ioi' values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, spreadsheet, or terminal showing the creation of a file named 'conditions.csv' containing a column header 'ioi' and the values 0.4 and 0.6.

task_completion.description: Set up the outer 'blocks' loop and inner 'pacing' loop with the correct repetitions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder flow panel showing an outer loop named 'blocks' and an inner loop named 'pacing'. The loop properties for 'pacing' should show nReps set to 10 and the conditions file loaded.

task_completion.description: Configure the Synchronization routine with a fixation cross and a 440Hz sound controlled by 'ioi'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A routine (e.g., 'Synchronization') nested inside the 'pacing' loop containing a visual component (fixation cross) and a Sound component. The Sound component properties should show a frequency of 440, duration of 0.05s, and timing (start or duration) referencing the '$ioi' variable.

task_completion.description: Configure the Continuation routine with a visual cue and keyboard recording.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A routine (e.g., 'Continuation') placed after the 'pacing' loop but within the 'blocks' loop. It must contain a visual component with a duration of at least 10 seconds and a Keyboard component configured to record 'all keys' or save all responses.

task_completion.description: Save the experiment to the correct path and generate a valid Python script.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy window title shows 'sync_continuation.psyexp' saved in the '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/tapping/' directory. There should be evidence of script generation, such as clicking the 'Compile to Python script' button, a Runner window, or a generated '.py' file visible in the file manager.

integrity.description: The agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to construct the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the PsychoPy Builder interface (adding routines, loops, and components) rather than manually writing XML or Python code in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent built the experiment from scratch rather than loading a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the step-by-step addition and configuration of individual components (Sound, Keyboard, Polygon/Text) and loops.

integrity.description: The conditions file was genuinely loaded into the PsychoPy loop.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Loop Properties dialog in PsychoPy shows the conditions file path and displays a summary like '2 conditions with 1 parameters' confirming it parsed the CSV correctly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The experiment must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/tapping/sync_continuation.psyexp'. The conditions file must be at '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/tapping/conditions.csv' and contain an 'ioi' column with values 0.4 and 0.6. The inner loop 'pacing' must have at least 10 repetitions (nReps=10).
